expect_text: When custom-agent runtime is available **and** `.codex/agents/browser-verifier.toml` exists, dispatch the pass to that custom agent.
Missing custom-agent runtime or artifact is an inline fallback, **not** `MISSING-TOOL`.
The screenshots' image tokens stay in the custom agent's context; build's context holds only "PASS/DRIFT + reason".
Dispatched item agents (serial or the parallel tail) default to cheap tier (the mechanical-tier executor role)
write workers default to sequential (one item's work packet at a time)
**Base SHA** — the commit/state it started from, so the returned diff has something to diff against.
The dispatching agent never accepts `status: done` at face value
